input.userMessage: จริงๆ ตอนนี้รายจ่ายเยอะมากค่ะ ยังไม่รู้เลยว่าจะไหวไหมกับข้อเสนอพวกนี้
input.LastAImessage:
เสนอแผนการปรับโครงสร้างสินเชื่อ ด้วยแผนงานและข้อมูลดังนี้

input.narrative: The advisor presented two TDR plan options. The customer has responded by stating they are willing to pay more per installment to clear the debt faster. The conversation is being routed back to the advisor to adjust the recommendation.

expectedOutput.narrative: The advisor presented four TDR plan options for debt restructuring. The customer expressed concern about their high expenses and is unsure if they can afford any of the proposed plans. The conversation is being routed back to the advisor to address affordability and potentially modify the recommendation.
